title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training course 'DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring' has demonstrated high effectiveness, achieving a completion rate of 100% and a pass rate of 100% among 10 trainees. The overall attendance rate stands at 96%, indicating strong engagement. The average score of 7.89 out of 10 reflects a solid understanding of the course material, complemented by a feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5, suggesting positive trainee experiences.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course has successfully met all effectiveness criteria, with no flags raised for performance or attendance issues.
The ROI proxy of 0.0207 indicates a favorable return on investment relative to the scaled cost of 15.
The high average score and feedback rating suggest that the course content and delivery were well-received by participants.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.

To maintain and enhance the effectiveness of future training initiatives, it is recommended to continue leveraging the successful elements of this course while exploring opportunities for advanced topics or follow-up sessions that build on the foundational knowledge provided.
Additionally, consider implementing a mentorship program for high-performing trainees to foster leadership skills and knowledge sharing.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
